name: Baked Orzo with Kalamata Olives and Fresh Herbs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Kalamata olives, pitted and coarsely chopped
1/2 cup chopped fresh herbs (parsley, basil, oregano, thyme)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat and cook onions until tender.
2. Add orzo and cook for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add olives and 2 cups of chicken stock; bring to a boil.
4. Simmer for 5 minutes and add 2 more cups of chicken stock.
5. Return to a boil and pour into a butter baking dish.
6. Cover with foil and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes, stirring once.
7. After 20 minutes, check orzo; if necessary, add more stock and continue to bake until tender.
8. Sprinkle with fresh chopped herbs and serve hot.
Yield: 4 servings
